Title: Simulate Stack Operations
Description:
Simulate a stack given N operations. After all operations, output the top element. If empty, output `EMPTY`.

Operations: `PUSH x`, `POP`, `TOP`.
First line: N. Next N lines: operations.

**Constraints:**
- 1 <= N <= 500,000
- POP never called on empty stack
- Expected complexity: O(N)
